{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Shield Sage
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Shield Sage]] can command the word 'Restrict'.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
